tests.name: forbid_overrides_permit
tests.description: Forbid takes priority over permit when both match
tests.policy:
permit (principal, action, resource);
forbid (principal, action, resource);

tests.name: permit_before_forbid_still_denied
tests.description: Order does not matter - forbid always wins
tests.policy:
permit (principal, action, resource);
forbid (principal == User::"alice", action, resource);

tests.name: multiple_permits_one_matches
tests.description: Only one permit needs to match for allow
tests.policy:
permit (principal == User::"bob", action, resource);
permit (principal == User::"alice", action, resource);

tests.name: forbid_non_matching_allows_permit
tests.description: Non-matching forbid does not block matching permit
tests.policy:
permit (principal, action, resource);
forbid (principal == User::"bob", action, resource);

tests.name: no_matching_policies_deny
tests.description: No matching policies results in default deny

tests.name: conditional_forbid_overrides
tests.description: Conditional forbid with matching condition overrides permit
tests.policy:
permit (principal, action, resource);
forbid (principal, action, resource) when { context.blocked == true };
